content.title: Task Tracker
content.description: This is a task management application built with Vue 3 that allows users to create, track, and manage daily tasks. The application provides an intuitive interface for adding tasks with reminders, setting due dates, and organizing tasks efficiently. It demonstrates modern Vue.js development practices with component-based architecture and reactive state management.
content.role: I developed a complete task tracking application from scratch using Vue 3 and Vite. I implemented the core functionality including task creation, deletion, and reminder toggling with a clean component-based architecture. I designed and built all UI components including forms, task cards, and interactive elements with proper event handling and state management.

achievements: Created a fully functional task management system with CRUD operations
Implemented responsive design with modern UI/UX practices
Established proper component hierarchy and data flow patterns
Demonstrated proficiency in Vue.js ecosystem and modern frontend development
technologies: Vue 3 with Composition API and Options API
Vite for build tooling and development server
JSON Server for potential backend integration

screenshots: Main task tracker interface showing task list and add task form
Task card component with reminder indicator
